magic_item_properties.attunement: Some magic items require a creature to form a bond with them before their magical properties can be used. This bond is called attunement, and certain items have a prerequisite for it. If the prerequisite is a class, a creature must be a member of that class to attune to the item. If the creature lacks the prerequisite, the item can't be attuned to it. Attuning to an item requires a creature to spend a short rest focused on only that item while being in physical contact with it. This can't be the same short rest used to learn the item's properties. If the short rest is interrupted, the attunement attempt fails. Otherwise, at the end of the short rest, the creature gains an intuitive understanding of how to activate any magical properties of the item, including any necessary command words. An item can be attuned to only one creature at a time. A creature can be attuned to no more than three magic items at a time.
magic_item_properties.cursed: Some magic items bear curses that bedevil their users, sometimes long after a user has stopped using an item. A magic item's description specifies whether the item is cursed. Most methods of identifying items, including the identify spell, fail to reveal such a curse, although lore might hint at it. A curse should be a surprise to the item's user when the curse's effects are revealed. Attunement to a cursed item can't be ended voluntarily unless the curse is broken first.
magic_item_properties.charges: Some magic items have charges that must be expended to activate their properties. The number of charges an item has remaining is discovered when the identify spell is cast on it, or when a creature attunes to it. Additionally, when a creature uses the item's last charge, the item might be destroyed or lose its magic if its description says so. If not, the item can't be used again until it regains charges.
magic_item_properties.recharge: Some magic items regain expended charges daily at dawn or another specified time. If an item regains charges, the item's description specifies how many and when.
magic_item_properties.spellcasting: Some magic items allow the user to cast a spell from the item. The spell is cast at the lowest possible spell level, doesn't expend any of the user's spell slots, and requires no components unless the item's description notes otherwise. The spell uses its normal casting time, range, and duration. The user must maintain concentration on a concentration spell if its description requires it.
magic_item_properties.spell_scroll: A spell scroll bears the words of a single spell, written in a mystical cipher. If the spell is on your spell list, you can read the scroll and cast its spell without providing material components. Otherwise, the scroll is unintelligible. If the spell is on your class's spell list but of a higher level than you can normally cast, you must make an ability check using your spellcasting ability to determine whether you cast it successfully. The DC equals 10 + the spell's level. On a failed check, the spell disappears from the scroll with no other effect.
magic_item_properties.wondrous_item: Wondrous items are magic items with a variety of magical effects, from the whimsical to the world-changing. They include items like bags of holding, cloaks of elvenkind, and figurines of wondrous power.

magic_item_categories.description: Magical armor that provides enhancement bonuses to Armor Class or special protective properties.

items.name: +1 Armor
items.description: You have a +1 bonus to AC while wearing this armor.

items.name: Adamantine Armor
items.type: Armor (medium or heavy, but not hide)
items.description: This suit of armor is reinforced with adamantine, one of the hardest substances in existence. While you're wearing it, any critical hit against you becomes a normal hit.

items.name: Mithral Armor
items.type: Armor (medium or heavy, but not hide)
items.description: Mithral is a light, flexible metal. A mithral chain shirt or breastplate can be worn under normal clothes. If the armor normally imposes disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks or has a Strength requirement, the mithral version of the armor doesn't.

items.name: Armor of Gleaming
items.description: This armor never gets dirty.

items.name: Cast-Off Armor
items.description: You can doff this armor as an action.

items.name: Mariner's Armor
items.description: While wearing this armor, you have a swimming speed equal to your walking speed. In addition, if you start your turn underwater with 0 hit points, you immediately regain 1d4 hit points. The armor can't heal anyone again until the next dawn.

items.name: Smoldering Armor
items.description: Wisps of harmless, odorless smoke rise from this armor while it is worn.

magic_item_categories.description: Magical armor that grants resistance to specific damage types.

items.name: Armor of Acid Resistance
items.description: You have resistance to acid damage while you wear this armor.

items.name: Armor of Cold Resistance
items.description: You have resistance to cold damage while you wear this armor.

items.name: Armor of Fire Resistance
items.description: You have resistance to fire damage while you wear this armor.

items.name: Armor of Force Resistance
items.description: You have resistance to force damage while you wear this armor.

items.name: Armor of Lightning Resistance
items.description: You have resistance to lightning damage while you wear this armor.

items.name: Armor of Necrotic Resistance
items.description: You have resistance to necrotic damage while you wear this armor.

items.name: Armor of Poison Resistance
items.description: You have resistance to poison damage while you wear this armor.

items.name: Armor of Psychic Resistance
items.description: You have resistance to psychic damage while you wear this armor.

items.name: Armor of Radiant Resistance
items.description: You have resistance to radiant damage while you wear this armor.

items.name: Armor of Thunder Resistance
items.description: You have resistance to thunder damage while you wear this armor.

magic_item_categories.description: Magical armor that provides benefits but also carries dangerous curses.

items.name: Armor of Vulnerability (Bludgeoning)
items.description: While wearing this armor, you have resistance to bludgeoning damage. This armor is cursed, and attuning to it curses you until you are targeted by a remove curse spell or similar magic. While cursed, you have vulnerability to piercing and slashing damage.

items.name: Armor of Vulnerability (Piercing)
items.description: While wearing this armor, you have resistance to piercing damage. This armor is cursed, and attuning to it curses you. While cursed, you have vulnerability to bludgeoning and slashing damage.

items.name: Armor of Vulnerability (Slashing)
items.description: While wearing this armor, you have resistance to slashing damage. This armor is cursed, and attuning to it curses you. While cursed, you have vulnerability to bludgeoning and piercing damage.

magic_item_categories.description: Magical shields with enhanced protective properties.

items.name: +1 Shield
items.description: While holding this shield, you have a +1 bonus to AC, in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC.

items.name: +2 Shield
items.description: While holding this shield, you have a +2 bonus to AC, in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC.

items.name: Arrow-Catching Shield
items.description: You gain a +2 bonus to AC against ranged attack rolls while you wield this shield. This bonus is in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC. Whenever an attacker makes a ranged attack roll against a target within 5 feet of you, you can use your reaction to become the target of the attack instead.

items.name: Shield of Expression
items.description: The front of this shield is shaped in the likeness of a face. While bearing the shield, you can use a bonus action to alter the face's expression.

items.name: Shield of Missile Attraction
items.description: While holding this shield, you have resistance to damage from ranged weapon attacks. This shield is cursed. Attuning to it curses you until you are targeted by a remove curse spell or similar magic. Whenever a ranged weapon attack targets a creature within 10 feet of you, the curse causes you to become the target instead.

items.name: Sentinel Shield
items.description: While holding this shield, you have advantage on initiative rolls and Wisdom (Perception) checks. The shield is emblazoned with a symbol of an eye.

magic_item_categories.description: Magical weapons with enhancement bonuses to attack and damage rolls.

items.name: +1 Weapon
items.description: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

items.name: +2 Weapon
items.description: You have a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

items.name: Adamantine Weapon
items.description: This weapon or piece of ammunition is made of adamantine. Whenever it hits an object, the hit is a critical hit.

items.name: Silvered Weapon
items.description: An alchemical process has bonded silver to this magic weapon. When you score a critical hit with it against a creature that is shape-shifted, the weapon deals one additional die of damage.

items.name: Vicious Weapon
items.description: This magic weapon deals an extra 2d6 damage to any creature it hits. This extra damage is of the same type as the weapon's normal damage.

items.name: Weapon of Warning
items.description: As long as this weapon is within your reach and you are attuned to it, you and allies within 30 feet of you gain the following benefits: The weapon magically awakens each subject who is sleeping naturally when combat begins, and each subject has advantage on its initiative rolls.

items.name: Moon-Touched Sword
items.description: In darkness, the unsheathed blade of this weapon sheds moonlight, creating bright light in a 15-foot radius and dim light for an additional 15 feet.

magic_item_categories.description: Magical weapons with unique special abilities.

items.name: Berserker Axe
items.description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. In addition, while you are attuned to this weapon, your hit point maximum increases by 1 for each level you have attained. This weapon is cursed, and becoming attuned to it extends the curse to you. You are unwilling to part with the weapon, and you have disadvantage on attack rolls with weapons other than this one. Whenever another creature damages you, you must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or go berserk.

items.name: Dagger of Venom
items.description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. You can use a bonus action to magically coat the blade with poison. The poison remains for 1 minute or until an attack using this weapon hits a creature. That creature must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or take 2d10 poison damage and become poisoned for 1 minute. The weapon can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

items.name: Dragon Slayer
items.description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The weapon deals an extra 3d6 damage of the weapon's type if the target is a dragon.

items.name: Flame Tongue
items.description: While holding this magic weapon, you can use a bonus action and a command word to cause flames to engulf the damage-dealing part of the weapon. These flames shed bright light in a 40-foot radius and dim light for an additional 40 feet. While the weapon is ablaze, it deals an extra 2d6 fire damage on a hit. The flames last until you use a bonus action to issue the command again or until you drop, stow, or sheathe the weapon.

items.name: Giant Slayer
items.description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a giant with this weapon, the giant takes an extra 2d6 damage of the weapon's type and must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or fall prone.

items.name: Javelin of Lightning
items.description: When you throw this javelin, you can forgo making a ranged attack roll and instead turn it into a bolt of lightning, forming a line 5 feet wide from you to the target. The target and each other creature in the line must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 4d6 lightning damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one. Immediately after dealing this damage, the weapon reappears in your hand. This property can't be used again until the next dawn.

items.name: Mace of Disruption
items.description: When you hit a fiend or an undead with this magic weapon, that creature takes an extra 2d6 radiant damage. If the target has 25 hit points or fewer after taking this damage, it must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be destroyed. While you hold this weapon, it sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.

items.name: Mace of Smiting
items.description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The bonus increases to +3 when you use the weapon to attack a construct. When you roll a 20 on an attack roll made with this weapon, the target takes an extra 7 bludgeoning damage, or 14 bludgeoning damage if it's a construct.

items.name: Mace of Terror
items.description: This magic weapon has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While holding the weapon, you can use an action and expend 1 charge to release a wave of terror. Each creature of your choice within 30 feet must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute.

items.name: Sun Blade
items.description: This item appears to be a sword hilt. While grasping the hilt, you can use a bonus action to cause a blade of pure radiance to spring into existence. You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon, which deals radiant damage instead of slashing damage. When you hit an undead with it, that target takes an extra 1d8 radiant damage. The sword's luminous blade emits bright light in a 15-foot radius and dim light for an additional 15 feet. The light is sunlight.

items.name: Sword of Life Stealing
items.description: When you attack a creature with this magic weapon and roll a 20 on the d20 for the attack roll, that target takes an extra 15 necrotic damage if it isn't a construct or undead, and you gain temporary hit points equal to the amount of necrotic damage taken.

items.name: Sword of Wounding
items.description: When you hit a creature with an attack using this magic weapon, the target takes an extra 2d6 necrotic damage and must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be unable to regain hit points for 1 hour. The target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

items.name: Trident of Fish Command
items.description: This magic weapon has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While you carry it, you can expend 1 charge to cast dominate beast (save DC 15) from it on a beast that has a swimming speed.

magic_item_categories.description: Magical arrows, bolts, bullets, and other projectiles.

items.name: +1 Ammunition
items.description: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this piece of magic ammunition. Once it hits a target, the ammunition is no longer magical. This ammunition is typically found or sold in quantities of ten or twenty pieces.

items.name: +2 Ammunition
items.description: You have a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this piece of magic ammunition. Once it hits a target, the ammunition is no longer magical. This ammunition is typically found or sold in quantities of ten or twenty pieces.

items.name: Walloping Ammunition
items.description: A creature hit by this ammunition must succeed on a DC 10 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

magic_item_categories.description: Magical items with practical utility and everyday uses.

items.name: Alchemy Jug
items.description: This ceramic jug appears to be able to hold a gallon of liquid and weighs 12 pounds whether full or empty. You can use an action and name one liquid to cause the jug to produce the chosen liquid. The maximum amount depends on the liquid. Once it starts producing a liquid, it can't produce a different one until the next dawn.

items.name: Bag of Holding
items.description: This bag has an interior space considerably larger than its outside dimensions. The bag can hold up to 500 pounds, not exceeding a volume of 64 cubic feet. The bag weighs 5 pounds, regardless of its contents. Retrieving an item from the bag requires an action. If the bag is overloaded, pierced, or torn, it is destroyed and its contents are scattered in the Astral Plane.

items.name: Bag of Tricks
items.description: This bag made from cloth appears empty. Reaching inside reveals a small, fuzzy object. You can use an action to pull the object from the bag and throw it up to 20 feet. When it lands, it transforms into a creature determined by rolling on a table. The creature is friendly to you and your allies, and it acts immediately after you on your initiative count. Once three objects have been pulled from the bag, the bag can't be used again until the next dawn.

items.name: Boots of Elvenkind
items.description: While you wear these boots, your steps make no sound, regardless of the surface you are moving across. You also have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

items.name: Boots of False Tracks
items.description: While wearing these boots, you can have them leave tracks like those of any kind of humanoid of your size.

items.name: Boots of Striding and Springing
items.description: While you wear these boots, your walking speed becomes 30 feet unless it is higher, and your speed isn't reduced by encumbrance or heavy armor. Once on each of your turns, you can jump up to 30 feet by spending only 10 feet of movement.

items.name: Boots of the Winterlands
items.description: These furred boots are snug and feel warm. While wearing them, you have resistance to cold damage and can tolerate temperatures of 0 degrees Fahrenheit or lower without any additional protection. You ignore difficult terrain created by ice or snow.

items.name: Broom of Flying
items.description: This wooden broom functions like a mundane broom until you stand astride it and use an action to make it hover beneath you. It has a flying speed of 50 feet. It can carry up to 400 pounds. The broom stops hovering when you land or when you're no longer riding it.

items.name: Cap of Water Breathing
items.description: While wearing this cap underwater, you can use an action to create a bubble of air around your head. This bubble allows you to breathe normally underwater. This bubble stays with you until the cap is removed or you are no longer underwater.

items.name: Cloak of Billowing
items.description: While wearing this cloak, you can use a bonus action to make it billow dramatically for 1 minute.

items.name: Cloak of Elvenkind
items.description: While you wear this cloak, Wisdom (Perception) checks made to perceive you have disadvantage, and you have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

items.name: Cloak of Many Fashions
items.description: While wearing this cloak, you can use a bonus action to change the style, color, and apparent quality of the garment. The cloak's weight doesn't change.

items.name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
items.description: While wearing this cloak, you can breathe underwater and you have a swimming speed of 60 feet.

items.name: Decanter of Endless Water
items.description: This stoppered flask sloshes when shaken. You can use an action to remove the stopper and issue one of three command words to produce fresh or salt water: 'splash' (1 gallon), 'fountain' (5 gallons), or 'geyser' (30 gallons).

items.name: Driftglobe
items.description: This small sphere of thick glass weighs 1 pound. You can command it to emanate the light of the light or daylight spell. Once used, the daylight effect can't be used again until the next dawn. You can make the globe rise into the air and float no more than 5 feet off the ground.

items.name: Dust of Disappearance
items.description: This powder resembles fine sand. When you throw it into the air, you and each creature and object within a 10-foot emanation become invisible for 2d4 minutes. The dust is consumed.

items.name: Dust of Dryness
items.description: This small packet contains 1d6+4 pinches of dust. You can sprinkle it over water, turning up to a 15-foot cube of water into one marble-sized pellet. The pellet can be smashed to release the water. Against water elementals, it deals 10d6 necrotic damage.

items.name: Ear Horn of Hearing
items.description: While held up to your ear, this horn suppresses the effects of the deafened condition on you.

items.name: Eyes of Minute Seeing
items.description: These crystal lenses fit over the eyes. While wearing them, your vision improves significantly out to a range of 1 foot, granting you darkvision within that range and advantage on Intelligence (Investigation) checks to examine something within that range.

items.name: Eyes of the Eagle
items.description: These crystal lenses fit over the eyes. While wearing them, you have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

items.name: Folding Boat
items.description: This object appears as a wooden box. With command words, it can unfold into a rowboat or a keelboat. The vessel returns to box form when another command word is spoken.

items.name: Heward's Handy Haversack
items.description: This backpack has a central pouch and two side pouches, each an extradimensional space. Each side pouch can hold up to 200 pounds, and the central pouch up to 500 pounds. The haversack always weighs 5 pounds. Retrieving an item requires an action or bonus action.

items.name: Immovable Rod
items.description: This iron rod has a button on one end. When pressed, the rod becomes magically fixed in place until the button is pressed again. It can hold up to 8,000 pounds of weight.

items.name: Lantern of Revealing
items.description: While lit, this hooded lantern burns for 6 hours on 1 pint of oil, shedding bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet. Invisible creatures and objects are visible in the lantern's bright light.

items.name: Portable Hole
items.description: This fine black cloth unfolds into a circular sheet 6 feet in diameter. When placed on a solid surface, it creates an extradimensional hole 10 feet deep. Folding the cloth closes the hole.

items.name: Rope of Climbing
items.description: This 60-foot rope can hold up to 3,000 pounds. You can command one end to animate and move toward a destination. The rope can fasten itself, knot or unknot itself, or coil itself. While knotted, the rope grants advantage on checks to climb using it.

items.name: Rope of Entanglement
items.description: This 30-foot rope can be commanded to dart forward and entangle a creature. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or be restrained. A restrained target can escape with a DC 15 Strength or Dexterity check.

items.name: Sending Stones
items.description: Sending stones come in pairs. While you touch one stone, you can cast sending from it, targeting the bearer of the other stone. Once used, the stones can't be used again until the next dawn.

magic_item_categories.description: Magical items that provide defensive benefits and resistances.

items.name: Amulet of Health
items.description: Your Constitution score is 19 while you wear this amulet. It has no effect if your Constitution is already 19 or higher.

items.name: Amulet of Proof against Detection and Location
items.description: While wearing this amulet, you can't be targeted by divination spells or perceived through magical scrying sensors unless you allow it.

items.name: Bracers of Archery
items.description: While wearing these bracers, you have proficiency with the longbow and shortbow, and you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls made with such weapons.

items.name: Bracers of Defense
items.description: While wearing these bracers, you gain a +2 bonus to AC if you are wearing no armor and using no shield.

items.name: Brooch of Shielding
items.description: While wearing this brooch, you have resistance to force damage and immunity to damage from the magic missile spell.

items.name: Cloak of Displacement
items.description: While you wear this cloak, it projects an illusion that makes you appear to be standing near your actual location, causing any creature to have disadvantage on attack rolls against you. If you take damage, the property ceases to function until the start of your next turn.

items.name: Cloak of Protection
items.description: You gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws while you wear this cloak.

items.name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
items.description: Your Strength score is 19 while you wear these gauntlets. They have no effect if your Strength is 19 or higher without them.

items.name: Gloves of Missile Snaring
items.description: If you're hit by a ranged weapon attack while wearing these gloves, you can use your reaction to reduce the damage by 1d10 + your Dexterity modifier. If you reduce the damage to 0, you can catch the ammunition if it's small enough to hold.

items.name: Gloves of Swimming and Climbing
items.description: While wearing these gloves, climbing and swimming don't cost you extra movement, and you gain a +5 bonus to Strength (Athletics) checks made to climb or swim.

items.name: Goggles of Night
items.description: While wearing these dark lenses, you have darkvision out to 60 feet. If you already have darkvision, wearing the goggles increases its range by 60 feet.

items.name: Hat of Disguise
items.description: While wearing this hat, you can cast the disguise self spell. The spell ends if the hat is removed.

items.name: Headband of Intellect
items.description: Your Intelligence score is 19 while you wear this headband. It has no effect if your Intelligence is 19 or higher without it.

items.name: Helm of Comprehending Languages
items.description: While wearing this helm, you can cast comprehend languages from it.

items.name: Helm of Telepathy
items.description: While wearing this helm, you have telepathy with a range of 30 feet, and you can cast detect thoughts or suggestion from the helm. Once either spell is cast, it can't be cast from it again until the next dawn.

items.name: Mantle of Spell Resistance
items.description: You have advantage on saving throws against spells while you wear this cloak.

items.name: Necklace of Adaptation
items.description: While wearing this necklace, you can breathe normally in any environment, and you have advantage on saving throws against poison.

items.name: Periapt of Health
items.description: While wearing this pendant, you can use an action to regain 2d4+2 hit points. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn. You also have advantage on saving throws against poison.

items.name: Periapt of Proof against Poison
items.description: While you wear this pendant, you have immunity to the poisoned condition and poison damage.

items.name: Periapt of Wound Closure
items.description: While wearing this pendant, you can change a death saving throw of 9 or lower to a 10, and whenever you roll a Hit Point Die to regain hit points, double the number of hit points it restores.

items.name: Ring of Evasion
items.description: This ring has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. When you fail a Dexterity saving throw while wearing the ring, you can use your reaction to expend 1 charge to succeed on that save instead.

items.name: Ring of Feather Falling
items.description: When you fall while wearing this ring, you descend 60 feet per round and take no damage from falling.

items.name: Ring of Free Action
items.description: While you wear this ring, difficult terrain doesn't cost you extra movement. Magic can neither reduce any of your speeds nor cause you to be paralyzed or restrained.

items.name: Ring of Mind Shielding
items.description: While wearing this ring, you are immune to magic that reads your thoughts or determines if you're lying. Creatures can telepathically communicate with you only if you allow it. If you die while wearing the ring, your soul enters it.

items.name: Ring of Protection
items.description: You gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws while wearing this ring.

items.name: Ring of Resistance
items.description: You have resistance to one damage type while wearing this ring. The gemstone indicates the type.

items.name: Ring of Warmth
items.description: If you take cold damage while wearing this ring, the ring reduces the damage by 2d8. In addition, you and everything you wear and carry are unharmed by temperatures of 0 degrees Fahrenheit or lower.

items.name: Ring of Water Walking
items.description: While wearing this ring, you can cast water walk from it, targeting only yourself.

items.name: Ring of X-ray Vision
items.description: While wearing this ring, you can use an action to gain X-ray vision with a range of 30 feet for 1 minute. Using it again before a long rest requires a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or you gain one level of exhaustion.

items.name: Slippers of Spider Climbing
items.description: While you wear these light shoes, you can move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and along ceilings, leaving your hands free. You have a climbing speed equal to your walking speed.

items.name: Stone of Good Luck (Luckstone)
items.description: While this polished agate is on your person, you gain a +1 bonus to ability checks and saving throws.

items.name: Winged Boots
items.description: These boots have 4 charges and regain 1d4 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing them, you can use an action to expend 1 charge, gaining a flying speed of 30 feet for 1 hour.

items.name: Wings of Flying
items.description: While wearing this cloak, you can use an action to turn it into a pair of wings on your back for 1 hour. The wings give you a flying speed of 60 feet. When the wings disappear, you can't use them again for 1d12 hours.

magic_item_categories.description: Magical items that enhance combat abilities or provide offensive options.

items.name: Bead of Force
items.description: This small black sphere can be thrown up to 60 feet. It explodes in a 10-foot radius sphere on impact, dealing 5d4 force damage to each creature in the area. A sphere of transparent force then encloses the area for 1 minute. Only breathable air can pass through the sphere's wall.

items.name: Belt of Dwarvenkind
items.description: While wearing this belt, you know Dwarvish, have advantage on Charisma checks to interact with dwarves, and your Constitution increases by 2. If you aren't a dwarf, you also gain darkvision, resistance to poison damage, and advantage on saves against poison.

items.name: Belt of Giant Strength
items.description: While wearing this belt, your Strength score changes to the belt's score. It has no effect if your Strength is equal to or greater than the belt's score.

items.name: Circlet of Blasting
items.description: While wearing this circlet, you can cast scorching ray with it. The circlet can't cast this spell again until the next dawn.

items.name: Cube of Force
items.description: This cube is about an inch across. Each face has a distinct marking. You can press a face to cast a spell associated with it, expending the listed number of charges: mage armor (1), shield (1), Leomund's tiny hut (3), Mordenkainen's private sanctum (4), Otiluke's resilient sphere (4), wall of force (5).

items.name: Daern's Instant Fortress
items.description: You can use an action to place this 1-inch adamantine statuette on the ground and cause it to grow into a square adamantine tower. The tower is 20 feet square and 30 feet high, with arrow slits and a battlement. It has a single door that opens only at your command.

items.name: Eversmoking Bottle
items.description: Opening the bottle causes thick smoke to billow out, forming a cloud that fills a 60-foot emanation. The area is heavily obscured. The cloud expands 10 feet each minute it remains open, up to 120 feet. Closing the bottle fixes the cloud in place for 10 minutes.

items.name: Gem of Brightness
items.description: This prism has 50 charges. It can shed light, fire a beam that blinds creatures (1 charge), or flare with intense light in a 30-foot cone (5 charges). When all charges are expended, it becomes a nonmagical jewel worth 50 gp.

items.name: Gem of Seeing
items.description: This gem has 3 charges. As an action, you can expend 1 charge to gain truesight out to 120 feet when you peer through the gem for 10 minutes.

items.name: Horn of Blasting
items.description: You can use an action to blow the horn, emitting a thunderous blast in a 30-foot cone. Each creature must make a DC 15 Constitution save, taking 5d8 thunder damage on a failed save or half on a successful one. Each use has a 20% chance of causing the horn to explode, dealing 10d6 force damage to the user.

items.name: Horn of Valhalla
items.description: You can use an action to blow this horn, summoning warrior spirits that use the berserker stat block. They appear in unoccupied spaces within 60 feet of you, are friendly, and obey your commands. They return to Ysgard after 1 hour or when reduced to 0 hit points. Once used, the horn can't be used again for 7 days.

items.name: Iron Bands of Bilarro
items.description: This rusty iron sphere can be thrown at a Huge or smaller creature. Make a ranged attack roll. On a hit, the target is restrained until you use a bonus action to release it. A restrained creature can break free with a DC 20 Strength check, destroying the bands on a success.

items.name: Necklace of Fireballs
items.description: This necklace has 1d6+3 beads. You can detach and throw a bead up to 60 feet to detonate as a 3rd-level fireball (DC 15). Multiple beads can be thrown at once, increasing the damage by 1d6 per additional bead.

items.name: Necklace of Prayer Beads
items.description: This necklace has 1d4+2 magic beads. Types include: bead of blessing (bless), bead of curing (cure wounds), bead of favor (greater restoration), bead of smiting (shining smite), bead of summons (guardian of faith), and bead of wind walking (wind walk). Once a bead's spell is cast, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

variants.name: Anchor
variants.description: Touch to a boat or ship. For 24 hours, the vessel can't be moved.

variants.name: Bird
variants.description: Toss into the air to create a giant bird (roc stats) that can carry you.

variants.name: Fan
variants.description: Creates a giant fan that can increase a ship's speed by 5 mph for 8 hours.

variants.name: Swan Boat
variants.description: Creates a swan-shaped boat that moves across water at 6 mph for 24 hours.

variants.name: Whip
variants.description: Creates a floating whip that attacks for 1d6+5 force damage.

items.name: Ring of the Ram
items.description: This ring has 3 charges. You can expend 1-3 charges to make a ranged spell attack (+7) against a creature within 60 feet, dealing 2d10 force damage per charge and pushing it 5 feet per charge. Alternatively, you can use charges to make a Strength check (+5 per charge) to break a nonmagical object.

items.name: Rival Coin
items.description: This gold coin has a creature embossed on each side. When tossed, it creates an effect based on the result: heads deals psychic damage to a target, tails deals psychic damage to you.

items.name: Tentacle Rod
items.description: This rod ends in three rubbery tentacles. You can use an action to direct them to attack up to three creatures within 15 feet. Each tentacle makes a melee attack (+9) dealing 1d6 psychic damage on a hit. If you hit the same target with all three, it must make a DC 15 Dexterity save or be restrained, taking 3d6 psychic damage at the start of each of its turns.

items.name: Wind Fan
items.description: While holding this fan, you can cast gust of wind from it. Each subsequent use before the next dawn has a cumulative 20% chance of the fan tearing into useless tatters.

magic_item_categories.description: Items that serve as spellcasting foci or enhance spellcasting abilities.

items.name: +1 Rod of the Pact Keeper
items.bonus: +1 to spell attacks and save DCs
items.description: While holding this rod, you gain a +1 bonus to spell attack rolls and to the saving throw DCs of your warlock spells. In addition, you can regain one spell slot as an action while holding the rod. You can't use this property again until you finish a long rest.

items.name: +2 Rod of the Pact Keeper
items.bonus: +2 to spell attacks and save DCs
items.description: While holding this rod, you gain a +2 bonus to spell attack rolls and to the saving throw DCs of your warlock spells. In addition, you can regain one spell slot as an action while holding the rod. You can't use this property again until you finish a long rest.

items.name: +1 Wand of the War Mage
items.description: While holding this wand, you gain a +1 bonus to spell attack rolls. In addition, you ignore half cover when making a spell attack roll.

items.name: +2 Wand of the War Mage
items.description: While holding this wand, you gain a +2 bonus to spell attack rolls. In addition, you ignore half cover when making a spell attack roll.

items.name: Dark Shard Amulet
items.description: You can use this amulet as a spellcasting focus for your warlock spells. As an action, you can try to cast a cantrip you don't know from the warlock list with a DC 10 Arcana check. On success, you cast it. This property can't be used again until you finish a long rest.

items.name: Enspelled Staff
items.description: Bound into this staff is a spell. The staff has 6 charges and regains 1d6 charges daily at dawn. While holding the staff, you can expend 1 charge to cast its spell. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff becomes a nonmagical quarterstaff. The spell's save DC and attack bonus depend on the spell level.

items.name: Hat of Wizardry
items.description: You can use this hat as a spellcasting focus for your wizard spells. As an action, you can try to cast a cantrip you don't know from the wizard list with a DC 10 Arcana check. On success, you cast it. This property can't be used again until you finish a long rest.

items.name: Ioun Stone (Reserve)
items.description: This vibrant purple prism stores spells cast into it, holding them until you use them. It can store up to 4 spell levels at a time. Any creature can cast a spell of level 1-4 into it. While orbiting your head, you can cast any spell stored in it.

items.name: Nature's Mantle
items.description: This cloak shifts color to blend with the terrain. You can use it as a spellcasting focus for your druid and ranger spells. While in a lightly obscured area, you can Hide as a bonus action even if observed.

items.name: Orb of Direction
items.description: This orb can be used as an arcane focus. While holding it, you can use an action to determine which way is magnetic north.

items.name: Orb of Time
items.description: This orb can be used as an arcane focus. While holding it, you can use an action to determine whether it is morning, afternoon, evening, or nighttime.

items.name: Pearl of Power
items.description: While this pearl is on your person, you can use an action to regain one expended spell slot of 3rd level or lower. Once used, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

items.name: Ruby of the War Mage
items.description: This 1-inch ruby allows you to use a simple or martial weapon as a spellcasting focus. You must attach the ruby to the weapon by pressing it against it for 10 minutes.

magic_item_categories.description: Items that summon creatures or control elemental forces.

items.name: Baba Yaga's Dancing Broom
items.description: While holding this broom, you can use an action to transform it into an animated broom under your control. The broom acts immediately after you on your initiative count and remains animate until you use a bonus action and command word to render it inanimate. If reduced to 0 hit points, it shatters and is destroyed.

items.name: Bowl of Commanding Water Elementals
items.description: While this bowl is filled with water and you are within 5 feet, you can use an action to summon a water elemental. It appears, obeys your commands, and takes its turn immediately after you. It disappears after 1 hour, when it dies, or when you dismiss it. The bowl can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

items.name: Brazier of Commanding Fire Elementals
items.description: While within 5 feet of this brazier, you can use an action to summon a fire elemental. It appears, obeys your commands, and takes its turn immediately after you. It disappears after 1 hour, when it dies, or when you dismiss it. The brazier can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

items.name: Censer of Controlling Air Elementals
items.description: While gently swinging this censer, you can use an action to summon an air elemental. It appears, obeys your commands, and takes its turn immediately after you. It disappears after 1 hour, when it dies, or when you dismiss it. The censer can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

items.name: Cube of Summoning
items.description: This tiny cube looks like a jack-in-the-box. When you wind its crank, a merry tune emits, the lid opens, and a creature appears. Roll on a table to determine which summoning spell is cast (summon aberration, beast, construct, dragon, elemental, or fey). The spell is cast at 5th level and doesn't require concentration. Once used, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

items.name: Elemental Gem
items.description: This gem contains a mote of elemental energy. When you break it as an action, you summon an elemental of the corresponding type. It appears, obeys your commands, and takes its turn immediately after you. It disappears after 1 hour, when it dies, or when you dismiss it.

items.name: Figurine of Wondrous Power
items.description: A statuette small enough to fit in a pocket. You can use an action to throw it to the ground, where it becomes a living creature. The creature is friendly, obeys commands, and takes its turn immediately after you. It exists for the specified duration or until it drops to 0 hit points.

items.name: Stone of Controlling Earth Elementals
items.description: While touching this 5-pound stone to the ground, you can use an action to summon an earth elemental. It appears within 30 feet, obeys your commands, and takes its turn immediately after you. It disappears after 1 hour, when it dies, or when you dismiss it. The stone can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

magic_item_categories.description: Magical liquids that provide temporary effects when consumed.

items.name: Potion of Healing
items.description: You regain 2d4+2 hit points when you drink this potion. The potion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.

items.name: Potion of Greater Healing
items.description: You regain 4d4+4 hit points when you drink this potion.

items.name: Potion of Superior Healing
items.description: You regain 8d4+8 hit points when you drink this potion.

items.name: Potion of Resistance
items.description: When you drink this potion, you have resistance to one type of damage for 1 hour.

items.name: Potion of Animal Friendship
items.description: When you drink this potion, you can cast the 3rd-level version of animal friendship (save DC 13).

items.name: Potion of Clairvoyance
items.description: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the clairvoyance spell (no concentration required).

items.name: Potion of Climbing
items.description: When you drink this potion, you gain a climbing speed equal to your walking speed for 1 hour and have advantage on Strength (Athletics) checks to climb.

items.name: Potion of Comprehension
items.description: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the comprehend languages spell for 1 hour.

items.name: Potion of Diminution
items.description: When you drink this potion, you gain the 'reduce' effect of the enlarge/reduce spell for 1d4 hours (no concentration required).

items.name: Potion of Fire Breath
items.description: After drinking this potion, you can use a bonus action to exhale fire at a target within 30 feet. The target makes a DC 13 Dexterity save, taking 4d6 fire damage on a failed save or half on a successful one. The effect ends after you exhale the fire three times or when 1 hour has passed.

items.name: Potion of Flying
items.description: When you drink this potion, you gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed for 1 hour and can hover.

items.name: Potion of Gaseous Form
items.description: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the gaseous form spell for 1 hour (no concentration required).

items.name: Potion of Growth
items.description: When you drink this potion, you gain the 'enlarge' effect of the enlarge/reduce spell for 10 minutes (no concentration required).

items.name: Potion of Heroism
items.description: When you drink this potion, you gain 10 temporary hit points for 1 hour and are under the effect of the bless spell (no concentration required).

items.name: Potion of Invisibility
items.description: When you drink this potion, you become invisible for 1 hour. The effect ends early if you make an attack roll, deal damage, or cast a spell.

items.name: Potion of Invulnerability
items.description: For 1 minute after you drink this potion, you have resistance to all damage.

items.name: Potion of Mind Reading
items.description: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the detect thoughts spell for 10 minutes (save DC 13, no concentration required).

items.name: Potion of Poison
items.description: This potion looks and tastes like a potion of healing but is actually poison. If you drink it, you take 4d6 poison damage and must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution save or be poisoned for 1 hour.

items.name: Potion of Pugilism
items.description: After you drink this potion, each unarmed strike you make deals an extra 1d6 force damage on a hit. This effect lasts 10 minutes.

items.name: Potion of Speed
items.description: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the haste spell for 1 minute (no concentration required).

items.name: Potion of Vitality
items.description: When you drink this potion, it removes any exhaustion you are suffering and cures any disease or poison affecting you. For the next 24 hours, you regain the maximum number of hit points for any Hit Die you spend.

items.name: Potion of Water Breathing
items.description: You can breathe underwater for 24 hours after drinking this potion.

items.name: Elixir of Health
items.description: When you drink this potion, you are cured of all magical contagions and the blinded, deafened, paralyzed, and poisoned conditions end on you.

items.name: Oil of Etherealness
items.description: One vial of this oil can cover one Medium creature, granting the effect of the etherealness spell for 1 hour.

items.name: Oil of Slipperiness
items.description: One vial of this oil can cover one Medium creature, granting the effect of the freedom of movement spell for 8 hours. Alternatively, it can be poured on the ground to create the effect of the grease spell for 8 hours.

items.name: Philter of Love
items.description: The next time you see a creature within 10 minutes after drinking this philter, you become charmed by that creature for 1 hour.

items.name: Ring of Jumping
items.description: While wearing this ring, you can cast jump from it, but can target only yourself.

items.name: Ring of Spell Storing
items.description: This ring stores spells cast into it, holding them until the wearer uses them. It can store up to 5 levels worth of spells. Any creature can cast a spell of level 1-5 into it. While wearing it, you can cast any spell stored in it.

items.name: Ring of Swimming
items.description: You have a swimming speed of 40 feet while wearing this ring.

items.name: Rod of Rulership
items.description: You can use an action to present the rod and command obedience from each creature of your choice within 120 feet. Each target must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom save or be charmed for 8 hours. While charmed, the creature regards you as its trusted leader. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

magic_item_categories.description: Magical staves that function as quarterstaves and have spellcasting abilities.

items.name: Staff of Adornment
items.description: If you place a tiny object weighing no more than 1 pound above the tip of this staff while holding it, the object floats an inch from the staff's tip and remains there. The staff can have up to three such objects floating at once.

items.name: Staff of Birdcalls
items.description: This wooden staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and create one of several bird sounds. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff explodes in bird feathers and is lost forever.

items.name: Staff of Charming
items.prerequisite: Bard, cleric, druid, sorcerer, warlock, or wizard
items.description: This staff has 10 charges. You can expend charges to cast charm person, command, or comprehend languages. If you succeed on a save against an enchantment spell that targets only you, you can use a reaction to turn it back on its caster. If you fail such a save, you can turn the failure into a success once per dawn.

items.name: Staff of Flowers
items.description: This wooden staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and cause a flower to sprout from a patch of earth or soil. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff turns into flower petals and is lost forever.

items.name: Staff of Healing
items.description: This staff has 10 charges. You can expend charges to cast cure wounds (1 per level), lesser restoration (2), or mass cure wounds (5).

items.name: Staff of Swarming Insects
items.prerequisite: Bard, cleric, druid, sorcerer, warlock, or wizard
items.description: This staff has 10 charges. You can expend 1 charge to create an insect cloud that heavily obscures a 30-foot emanation. You can also cast giant insect (4 charges) or insect plague (5 charges).

items.name: Staff of the Adder
items.description: As a bonus action, you can turn the head of this staff into that of a venomous snake for 1 minute. When you take the Attack action, you can make one attack with the snake head, using your proficiency bonus and Wisdom modifier. On a hit, the target takes 1d6 piercing damage and 3d6 poison damage. The snake head has AC 15 and 20 hit points.

items.name: Staff of the Python
items.description: As an action, you can throw this staff to the ground within 10 feet, where it becomes a giant constrictor snake under your control. As a bonus action, you can command it to revert to staff form. If the snake is reduced to 0 hit points, it dies and the staff is destroyed.

items.name: Staff of the Woodlands
items.bonus: +2 to attack/damage with staff, +2 to spell attacks
items.description: This staff has 6 charges and can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff with +2 bonus. You can expend charges to cast various druid spells. You can also plant the staff in earth and expend 1 charge to transform it into a healthy tree.

items.name: Staff of Withering
items.description: This staff has 3 charges. On a hit with the staff, you can expend 1 charge to deal an extra 2d10 necrotic damage and force the target to make a DC 15 Constitution save. On a failure, the target has disadvantage on Strength and Constitution checks and saves for 1 hour.

items.name: Wand of Binding
items.description: This wand has 7 charges. You can expend charges to cast hold person (2) or hold monster (5) from it (save DC 17).

items.name: Wand of Conducting
items.description: This wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and create orchestral music by waving it around. The music can be heard up to 120 feet away.

items.name: Wand of Enemy Detection
items.description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge. For 1 minute, you know the direction of the nearest hostile creature to you within 60 feet, even if invisible or hidden.

items.name: Wand of Fear
items.description: This wand has 7 charges. You can expend charges to cast command (1) or fear (3) from it (save DC 15).

items.name: Wand of Fireballs
items.description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can expend no more than 3 charges to cast fireball (save DC 15). For 1 charge, you cast the 3rd-level version. You can increase the level by 1 per additional charge.

items.name: Wand of Lightning Bolts
items.description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can expend no more than 3 charges to cast lightning bolt (save DC 15). For 1 charge, you cast the 3rd-level version. You can increase the level by 1 per additional charge.

items.name: Wand of Magic Detection
items.description: This wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast detect magic from it.

items.name: Wand of Magic Missiles
items.description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can expend no more than 3 charges to cast magic missile. For 1 charge, you cast the 1st-level version. You can increase the level by 1 per additional charge.

items.name: Wand of Paralysis
items.description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge, causing a blue ray to streak toward a creature within 60 feet. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution save or be paralyzed for 1 minute.

items.name: Wand of Pyrotechnics
items.description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and create a harmless burst of multicolored light at a point within 120 feet, accompanied by a crackling noise audible up to 300 feet away.

items.name: Wand of Secrets
items.description: This wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge, and if a secret door or trap is within 60 feet, the wand pulses and points at the nearest one.

items.name: Wand of Web
items.description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast web (save DC 13) from it.

items.name: Wand of Wonder
items.description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and choose a point within 120 feet. Roll on a table to determine the random magical effect that occurs. Effects range from spellcasting to summoning creatures to turning the user to stone.

magic_item_categories.description: Magical scrolls containing spells or protective magic.

items.name: Spell Scroll
items.description: A spell scroll bears the words of a single spell. If the spell is on your spell list, you can read the scroll and cast it without material components. Casting requires the spell's normal casting time. If the spell is higher level than you can normally cast, you must make an ability check (DC 10 + spell level) to cast it successfully.

items.name: Scroll of Protection
items.description: Using an action to read this scroll creates a 5-foot emanation from you. For 5 minutes, creatures of the specified type can't enter or affect anything in the area. A creature within 5 feet can attempt a DC 15 Charisma save to overcome the effect.

magic_item_categories.description: Various other magical items with unique properties.

items.name: Bead of Nourishment
items.description: This flavorless, gelatinous bead dissolves on your tongue and provides as much nourishment as 1 day of rations.

items.name: Bead of Refreshment
items.description: This flavorless, gelatinous bead dissolves in liquid, transforming up to a pint of the liquid into fresh, cold drinking water.

items.name: Candle of the Deep
items.description: The flame of this candle isn't extinguished when immersed in water. It gives off light and heat like a normal candle.

items.name: Charlatan's Die
items.description: Whenever you roll this six-sided die, you can control which number it rolls.

items.name: Chime of Opening
items.description: As an action, you can strike the chime to cast knock. The chime's tone is audible out to 300 feet. The chime can be used 10 times before it cracks and becomes useless.

items.name: Clockwork Amulet
items.description: When you make an attack roll while wearing this amulet, you can forgo rolling the d20 to get a 10 on the die. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

items.name: Clothes of Mending
items.description: This elegant outfit magically mends itself to counteract daily wear and tear. Pieces that are destroyed can't be repaired.

items.name: Dimensional Shackles
items.description: You can use an action to place these shackles on an incapacitated creature. They prevent the creature from using extradimensional movement, including teleportation or plane travel. The bound creature can make a DC 30 Strength check once every 30 days to break free, destroying the shackles.

items.name: Dread Helm
items.description: While wearing this fearsome steel helm, your eyes glow red and the rest of your face is hidden in shadow.

items.name: Enduring Spellbook
items.description: This spellbook, along with anything written on its pages, can't be damaged by fire or water and doesn't deteriorate with age.

items.name: Ersatz Eye
items.description: This magical eye replaces a real one that was lost. You can see through it as though it were your natural eye. It can't be removed against your will while you are alive.

items.name: Hag Eye
items.description: This item has 3 charges. While wearing it, you can expend 1 charge to cast darkvision or see invisibility. A hag in the coven that created it can see what the Hag Eye sees as an action.

items.name: Hat of Vermin
items.description: This hat has 3 charges. As an action, you can expend 1 charge to summon a bat, a frog, or a rat. The creature appears in the hat and tries to get away from you. It is indifferent and disappears after 1 hour or when reduced to 0 hit points.

items.name: Heward's Handy Spice Pouch
items.description: This belt pouch has 10 charges. As an action, you can expend 1 charge to remove a pinch of any nonmagical food seasoning, enough to season a single meal.

items.name: Horn of Silent Alarm
items.description: This horn has 4 charges. As an action, you can blow it while expending 1 charge. One creature of your choice within 600 feet hears the horn's blare; no other creature hears it.

items.name: Horseshoes of Speed
items.description: These horseshoes come in a set of four. When attached to a horse or similar creature, its speed increases by 30 feet.

items.name: Instrument of Illusions
items.description: While playing this musical instrument, you can use an action to create harmless illusory visual effects within a 5-foot emanation. If you are a bard, the emanation increases to 15 feet.

items.name: Instrument of Scribing
items.description: This musical instrument has 3 charges. As an action, you can expend 1 charge to write a magical message of up to six words on a surface within 30 feet. The message fades after 24 hours.

items.name: Instrument of the Bards
items.description: An instrument of the bards is superior to an ordinary instrument. A creature that attempts to play it without being attuned must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom save or take 2d4 psychic damage. You can play it to cast spells from it. Once used to cast a spell, it can't be used to cast that spell again until the next dawn.

items.name: Ioun Stone

variants.name: Awareness
variants.effect: Advantage on initiative rolls and Perception checks

variants.name: Sustenance
variants.effect: No need to eat or drink

items.description: When you use an action to toss an Ioun stone into the air, the stone orbits your head at a distance of 1d3 feet, conferring its benefit. You can have up to three stones orbiting at once. As an action, you can seize and stow any number of them.

items.name: Keoghtom's Ointment
items.description: This glass jar contains 1d4+1 doses of ointment. As an action, you can swallow or apply one dose, allowing the recipient to regain 2d8+2 hit points and be cured of poison.

items.name: Lock of Trickery
items.description: This lock appears ordinary but its tumblers adjust to thwart burglars. Dexterity checks to pick it have disadvantage.

items.name: Medallion of Thoughts
items.description: The medallion has 5 charges. While wearing it, you can expend 1 charge to cast detect thoughts (save DC 13) from it.

items.name: Mystery Key
items.description: A question mark is worked into the head of this key. The key has a 5% chance of unlocking any lock into which it's inserted. Once it unlocks something, the key disappears.

items.name: Perfume of Bewitching
items.description: This tiny vial contains perfume for one use. For 1 hour after applying it, you have advantage on Charisma (Deception and Persuasion) checks against creatures within 5 feet.

items.name: Pipe of Smoke Monsters
items.description: While smoking this pipe, you can use an action to exhale a puff of smoke that takes the form of a creature small enough to fit in a 1-foot cube.

items.name: Pipes of Haunting
items.description: These pipes have 3 charges. You can use an action to play them and expend 1 charge. Each creature of your choice within 30 feet must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom save or become frightened for 1 minute.

items.name: Pipes of the Sewers
items.description: While these pipes are on your person, ordinary rats and giant rats are indifferent toward you. You can expend charges to summon swarms of rats. Swarms that come within 30 feet while you play must make a DC 15 Wisdom save or become friendly and obey your commands.

items.name: Pole of Angling
items.description: While holding this pole, you can use an action to transform it into a fishing pole with hook, line, and reel, or revert it back.

items.name: Pole of Collapsing
items.description: While holding this pole, you can use an action to collapse it into a 1-foot rod for storage, or cause it to revert to full length.

items.name: Pot of Awakening
items.description: If you plant an ordinary shrub in this 10-pound clay pot and let it grow for 30 days, it transforms into an awakened shrub that is friendly to you.

items.name: Prosthetic Limb
items.description: This magic item replaces a lost limb. While attached, it functions identically to the part it replaces. You can detach or reattach it as an action, and it can't be removed against your will while you are alive.

items.name: Robe of Eyes
items.description: This robe is adorned with eyelike patterns. You have advantage on Perception checks that rely on sight, and you have darkvision and truesight, both with a range of 120 feet. Light or daylight spells cast on or near the robe can blind you.

items.name: Robe of Useful Items
items.description: This robe has cloth patches of various shapes and colors. As an action, you can detach a patch to make it become the object or creature it represents. The robe has two each of: bullseye lantern, dagger, mirror, pole, rope, sack. It also has 4d4 other random patches.

items.name: Rope of Mending
items.description: This 50-foot rope can repair itself when cut. As an action, you can cause all pieces of the rope that are in contact with each other to knit back together.

items.name: Saddle of the Cavalier
items.description: While in this saddle on a mount, you can't be dismounted against your will if you're conscious, and attack rolls against the mount have disadvantage.

items.name: Sylvan Talon
items.type: Weapon (dagger, rapier, scimitar, shortsword, sickle, or spear)
items.description: While this weapon is on your person, you understand the non-written communication of all fey, and they understand yours. As an action, you can use the weapon to cast message. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

items.name: Talking Doll
items.description: While this doll is within 5 feet of you, you can spend a short rest telling it up to six phrases (each six words or less) and set a condition for when it speaks. The doll's phrases are lost when your attunement ends.

items.name: Tankard of Sobriety
items.description: You can drink alcoholic beverages poured into this tankard without becoming inebriated. It has no effect on magical liquids or poisons.

items.name: Veteran's Cane
items.description: As a bonus action, you can transform this walking cane into an ordinary longsword or change it back. You must be holding the item.

magic_item_creation.description: Creating a magic item is a lengthy, expensive, and sometimes dangerous task. Rules for creating magic items are provided in the Dungeon Master's Guide.
general_rules: A character who is a spellcaster and has the appropriate tool proficiency can create a magic item.
The character must also know the formula for the item, which can be obtained through research, from a mentor, or by reverse-engineering another item.
The creator must have a physical component to use as the base item.
The creator must spend time and money crafting the item, and must meet level prerequisites.
More powerful items require higher-level creators, more time, and greater expense.
